mapper.sql: id, username, passwd, roletype, email, tel, sex, img, favs, openid, jifen, fname, idcard, money, sid, shop, desktop
mapper.insert: insert into wct_user (id, username, passwd, roletype, email, tel, sex, img, favs, openid, jifen, fname, idcard, money, sid, shop, desktop ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roletype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{favs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jifen,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{money,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{desktop,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into wct_user
id,
username,
passwd,
roletype,
email,
tel,
sex,
img,
favs,
openid,
jifen,
fname,
idcard,
money,
sid,
shop,
desktop,

#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{passwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update wct_user
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
passwd = #{passwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
roletype = #{roletype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
favs = #{favs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
openid = #{openid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jifen = #{jifen,jdbcType=INTEGER},
fname = #{fname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idcard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
money = #{money,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
desktop = #{desktop,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update wct_user set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, passwd = #{passwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, roletype = #{roletype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, img = #{img,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, favs = #{favs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, openid = #{openid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jifen = #{jifen,jdbcType=INTEGER}, fname = #{fname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, idcard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, money = #{money,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sid = #{sid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shop = #{shop,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, desktop = #{desktop,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
